structured_payload_candidate.title: SPLR UP for Variable Speed Centrifugal Chillers
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When any chillers in the current stage are variable speed centrifugal, SPLR UP calculated as Min(Max(0.45, E*LIFT+F), 0.9) with LIFT=CWRT-CHWSTSP, E=0.9/(LIFTmax-LIFTmin), F=E*(0.4*LIFTmax - 1.4*LIFTmin).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any chillers in the current operating stage are variable speed centrifugal.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: SPLR UP = Min(Max(0.45, E*LIFT+F), 0.9) using prescribed E and F based on averaged LIFTminX and LIFTmaxX.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When any chillers in the current operating stage are variable speed centrifugal, SPLR UP shall be calculated as the 5 minute rolling average of the following equation sampled at least every 30 seconds: 𝑆𝑃𝐿𝑅𝑈𝑃=𝑀𝑖𝑛 (𝑀𝑎𝑥 (0.45,𝐸∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 +𝐹),0.9) 𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 =𝐶𝑊𝑅𝑇 −𝐶𝐻𝑊𝑆 𝑇𝑆𝑃 𝐸=0.9/(𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛) 𝐹=𝐸∗(0.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−1.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛)

evidence_quote: When any chillers in the current operating stage are variable speed centrifugal, SPLR UP shall be calculated as the 5 minute rolling average of the following equation sampled at least every 30 seconds: 𝑆𝑃𝐿𝑅𝑈𝑃=𝑀𝑖𝑛 (𝑀𝑎𝑥 (0.45,𝐸∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 +𝐹),0.9) 𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 =𝐶𝑊𝑅𝑇 −𝐶𝐻𝑊𝑆 𝑇𝑆𝑃 𝐸=0.9/(𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛) 𝐹=𝐸∗(0.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−1.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛)

structured_payload_candidate.title: SPLR DN for Variable Speed Centrifugal Chillers
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a variable speed centrifugal chiller operates in the next lower stage, SPLR DN shall be calculated similarly as SPLR UP: Min(Max(0.45, E*LIFT+F), 0.9) with same definitions.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: A variable speed centrifugal chiller operates in the next lower stage.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: SPLR DN = Min(Max(0.45, E*LIFT+F), 0.9) using same E and F but based on averaged LIFTminX and LIFTmaxX from chillers in the next lower stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When a variable speed centrifugal chiller operates in the next lower stage, SPLR DN shall be calculated as the 5 minute rolling average of the following equation sampled at least every 30 seconds: 𝑆𝑃𝐿𝑅𝐷𝑁=𝑀𝑖𝑛 (𝑀𝑎𝑥 (0.45,𝐸∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 +𝐹),0.9) 𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 =𝐶𝑊𝑅𝑇 −𝐶𝐻𝑊𝑆 𝑇𝑆𝑃 𝐸=0.9/(𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛) 𝐹=𝐸∗(0.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−1.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛)

evidence_quote: When a variable speed centrifugal chiller operates in the next lower stage, SPLR DN shall be calculated as the 5 minute rolling average of the following equation sampled at least every 30 seconds: 𝑆𝑃𝐿𝑅𝐷𝑁=𝑀𝑖𝑛 (𝑀𝑎𝑥 (0.45,𝐸∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 +𝐹),0.9) 𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇 =𝐶𝑊𝑅𝑇 −𝐶𝐻𝑊𝑆 𝑇𝑆𝑃 𝐸=0.9/(𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛) 𝐹=𝐸∗(0.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑎𝑥−1.4∗𝐿𝐼𝐹𝑇𝑚𝑖𝑛)

structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Up from WSE Only Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When only WSE enabled, stage up if CHW supply temperature > setpoint by 2°F for 20 minutes or > 4°F for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: CHWST > setpoint by 2°F for 20 min or 4°F for 10 min when only WSE enabled.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Initiate stage up to bring on chillers.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: j. When only the Waterside Economizer is enabled, stage up if either of the following is true: 1. CHW supply temperature is 2°F > setpoint for 20 minutes; or 2. CHW supply temperature is 4°F > setpoint for 10 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary CHW Pump Staging Based on Flow Ratio
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Headered variable speed primary CHW pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Start next lag pump if CHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps) / (N - 0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Start the next lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: CHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-.03)

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Tower Fan Speed Limit Based on OPLR
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Cooling towers in CWRT control mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Maximum tower speed limited based on OPLR: reset PlrTowerMaxSpd linearly from 100% at 50% OPLR down to 70% at 0% OPLR.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Limit maximum tower speed: PlrTowerMaxSpd = linear interpolation between 70% at 0% OPLR and 100% at 50% OPLR.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Maximum tower speed shall be limited based on OPLR . Reset the variable PlrTowerMaxSpd linearly from 100% at 50% OPLR down to 70% at 0% OPLR .

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Tower Bypass Valve Freeze Protection
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Cooling tower bypass valves in freezing weather
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If any condenser water pump on, all tower fans off, and CWST from tower falls below 40°F for 5 minutes, fully open tower bypass valve to basins.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: CW pump on, tower fans off, CWST < 40°F for 5 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fully open tower bypass valve to basins.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. If any condenser water pump is on, all tower fans are off, and CWST from the tower falls below 40°F for 5 minutes, fully open the tower bypass valve to the tower basins.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Total Plant Power Calculation for Performance Monitoring
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Calculate total plant power as sum of chiller, pump, and cooling tower fan power; for VFD motors use actual power from VFD interface, for fixed speed assume BHP*0.746/0.93.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Compute total plant power as described.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Total plant power. Calculate total plant power as the sum of chiller power, pump power, and cooling tower fan power. For motors with VFDs, power shall be actual power as read through the VFD network interface. For fixed speed motors (e.g., CW pumps without VFDs), power shall be assumed to be fixed at BHP (from equipment schedule) * 0.746 / 0.93 (approximate motor efficiency).
